source: Hello driver of Five Foxtrot Five Three, I understand you are ready to return to Brighton. I am routing a train around you, wait for the signal to clear.
target: 5F53 次司机你好，我知道你已准备好返回布莱顿。我正指挥一列车从你旁边绕行，请等待信号开放。

source: Hello driver of Five Foxtrot Five Three, you are authorised to pass signal Tango Echo Bravo 1359 at danger to assist One Delta Zero Five, stopped at Berwick Station. Please call me once you have coupled to One Delta Zero Five.
target: 5F53 次司机你好，你获准越过显示险阻信号的 TEB 1359 号信号机，前往救援停在贝里克站的 1D05 次列车。连挂好 1D05 后请呼叫我。

source: Hello driver of Five Foxtrot Five Three, you may propel past signal Tango Echo Bravo 1361 to use the crossover. The driver of the failed train will assist you.
target: 呼叫 5F53 次列车司机，准许你推进越过 TEB 1361 号信号机并使用渡线。故障列车的司机将会协助你。

source: Hello driver, I am in the leading cab and signal Tango Echo Bravo 1361 is off. I am ready to propel past the crossover.
target: 司机你好，我已在前端司机室就位，TEB 1361 号信号机现已开放。我已准备好引导列车推进并越过渡线。

source: Hello driver. A train has failed at Berwick and since you're moving empty coaching stock from Selhurst Depot, you're in the best position to clear the line without disrupting passenger traffic. Please rescue the train and drag it back to Brighton.
target: 司机你好。有一列车在贝里克发生了故障，鉴于你目前正从塞尔赫斯特车库执行空车回送任务，由你前去疏通线路最合适不过，这样也不会影响正常的客运服务。请前往救援该列车，并将其拖回布莱顿。
